text: Jane Nguyen is publicly associated with One Arrow Consulting Vietnam. Public profile results describe Jane Nguyen as a Managing Consultant for Vietnam and SEA Markets at One Arrow Consulting Vietnam. Her public LinkedIn result lists One Arrow Consulting Vietnam and University of Lincoln. It lists University of Lincoln education from 2013 to 2014, with a 2:1 result, activities including Student Ambassador and Volunteer, and modules related to international Human Resource Management and Development, leadership and management, presentation, and time management. The listed final dissertation topic is about non-monetary factors that engage young employees in medium-sized organizations in Vietnam. Public profile results list English and Vietnamese language ability. Public profile snippets also describe Jane as an insurance headhunter. Public company profile results describe One Arrow Consulting Vietnam as an international recruitment consulting firm headquartered in Hong Kong since 2014, with offices including Hong Kong, Singapore, Vietnam, and China. Public registry results list Nguyen Thi Huyen Trang as the legal representative of One Arrow Consulting Vietnam and show a founding date of February 8, 2017 for One Arrow Consulting Vietnam. This approved context does not include Jane's favorite food, personal hobbies, birthday, family details, or exact total years of work experience.
